epigraph.quote: A pretty campsite, ducks & geese & just a loo & basin with a library - book in, book out.

per_stop.quote: We walked along the town walls to the harbour + looked at the boats.
we had tea at a cross roads below the riding stables, because we could not drop off until 4 at Rhiwiau.
The castle, a square keep above the campsite, is very picturesque. Arg + cosy inside, & you can walk up 30 steps to the roof.
We stopped at elevenses to see the Llangollen Canal Viaduct.
A pretty campsite, ducks & geese & just a loo & basin with a library - book in, book out.
They had not enjoyed it, but had liked the riding - 6 days good weather.
